description: Cleaned INPUT endpoint registry. Keeps only operational P1, confirmation P2, and contextual P3 endpoints selected for the trading pipeline. Research/parking endpoints removed.
notes: P1 = operational core: OHLC, order book/liquidity, OI, CVD, current whale/large order alerts.
P2 = confirmation layer: market depth history, whale/large history, exchange flows, long/short sentiment, funding, liquidations.
P3 = contextual layer: Coinbase premium, ETF, options context, stablecoin liquidity, news/calendar/regime, miner ratio/MPI.
Research and parking endpoints were removed from this registry.
Direct Binance provider remains intentionally excluded. Binance can only appear as an exchange parameter inside CoinGlass/CryptoQuant calls.

ONCHAIN_EXCHANGE_FLOW.use: BTC flowing into exchange wallets for potential sell pressure.
ONCHAIN_EXCHANGE_FLOW.notes: Path and params follow the prior CryptoQuant architecture summary and should be validated with the active CryptoQuant plan/documentation before production use.

ONCHAIN_EXCHANGE_FLOW.use: BTC flowing out of exchange wallets for accumulation/custody context.
ONCHAIN_EXCHANGE_FLOW.notes: Path and params follow the prior CryptoQuant architecture summary and should be validated with the active CryptoQuant plan/documentation before production use.

ONCHAIN_EXCHANGE_FLOW.use: Net BTC flow into or out of exchange wallets.
ONCHAIN_EXCHANGE_FLOW.notes: Path and params follow the prior CryptoQuant architecture summary and should be validated with the active CryptoQuant plan/documentation before production use.

ONCHAIN_EXCHANGE_FLOW.use: BTC reserve held by exchange wallets for exchange supply context.
ONCHAIN_EXCHANGE_FLOW.notes: Path and params follow the prior CryptoQuant architecture summary and should be validated with the active CryptoQuant plan/documentation before production use.

STABLECOIN_LIQUIDITY.use: Stablecoins flowing into exchanges for potential buying power.
STABLECOIN_LIQUIDITY.notes: Path and params follow the prior CryptoQuant architecture summary and should be validated with the active CryptoQuant plan/documentation before production use.

STABLECOIN_LIQUIDITY.use: Stablecoins flowing out of exchanges; reduces immediate exchange dry powder.
STABLECOIN_LIQUIDITY.notes: Path and params follow the prior CryptoQuant architecture summary and should be validated with the active CryptoQuant plan/documentation before production use.

STABLECOIN_LIQUIDITY.use: Net stablecoin flow into or out of exchanges.
STABLECOIN_LIQUIDITY.notes: Path and params follow the prior CryptoQuant architecture summary and should be validated with the active CryptoQuant plan/documentation before production use.

STABLECOIN_LIQUIDITY.use: Stablecoin reserves held by exchanges for dry-powder liquidity context.
STABLECOIN_LIQUIDITY.notes: Path and params follow the prior CryptoQuant architecture summary and should be validated with the active CryptoQuant plan/documentation before production use.

MINER_FLOW.use: Miners Position Index for miner distribution risk context.
MINER_FLOW.notes: Path and params follow the prior CryptoQuant architecture summary and should be validated with the active CryptoQuant plan/documentation before production use.
